products.name: ProBook 15 Laptop
products.description: Reliable 15-inch laptop for daily productivity with 16GB RAM and 512GB SSD.

products.name: Gaming Elite Laptop
products.description: High-end gaming laptop featuring RTX 4060 graphics, 144Hz display, and RGB keyboard.

products.name: Office Desktop PC
products.description: Compact desktop computer perfect for office tasks, featuring a fast processor and 1TB storage.

products.name: Creator Workstation
products.description: Powerful desktop workstation optimized for video editing, 3D rendering, and heavy workloads.

products.name: 1TB External HDD
products.description: Portable 1TB external hard drive with USB 3.0 interface for fast data transfer.

products.name: 2TB Internal SATA HDD
products.description: Reliable 3.5-inch 2TB desktop internal hard drive for expanding your storage capacity.

products.name: 4TB Network Attached Storage
products.description: Personal cloud storage solution with 4TB capacity for automated backups.

products.name: 5-Port Gigabit Switch
products.description: Unmanaged 5-port gigabit ethernet switch for expanding your home or office network.

products.name: 24-Port Managed Switch
products.description: Rack-mountable 24-port managed switch for enterprise networking needs.

products.name: Cat6 Ethernet Cable 10ft
products.description: High-quality 10ft Cat6 patch cable for reliable wired network connections.

products.name: Cat5e Ethernet Cable 50ft
products.description: Long 50ft Cat5e cable, perfect for connecting devices across large rooms.

products.name: Kids Tablet 8-inch
products.description: Durable 8-inch tablet designed for kids, featuring parental controls and a protective bumper case.

products.name: Kids Tablet Pro 10-inch
products.description: Larger 10-inch kids tablet with an HD display, educational apps, and robust battery life.

products.name: Ergonomic Wireless Mouse
products.description: Comfortable wireless mouse with ergonomic design, adjustable DPI, and long battery life.

products.name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
products.description: Tactile mechanical keyboard with customizable RGB backlighting and anti-ghosting keys.

products.name: Wireless Keyboard and Mouse Combo
products.description: Sleek wireless keyboard and optical mouse bundle, connecting via a single USB receiver.

products.name: 1080p Webcam
products.description: High-definition webcam with built-in microphone for clear video calls and streaming.

reviews.comment: Excellent laptop, great performance for the price!
Good build quality, battery could be better.
Beast gaming machine! Runs everything on ultra.
Reliable and portable. Good for backups.
Very comfortable for long work sessions.
